zh.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: 英國諾圖波藍德阿克頓 安德 笛卡爾 費爾頓
zh.Alnwick, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克
zh.Old Felton, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德笛卡爾 費爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda de Echingham於1407年出生在英國諾圖波藍德阿克頓 安德 笛卡爾 費爾頓時，她的父親Father Matilda de Echingham23歲，母親Mother Matilda de Echingham21歲。她於1426年與Sir Lawrence Acton在英國諾圖波藍德笛卡爾 費爾頓結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1485年在她的家鄉享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda de Echingham于1407年出生在英国諾圖波藍德阿克頓 安德 笛卡爾 費爾頓时，她的父亲Father Matilda de Echingham23岁，母亲Mother Matilda de Echingham21岁。她于1426年与Sir Lawrence Acton在英国諾圖波藍德笛卡爾 費爾頓结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1485年在她的家乡享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda de Echingham was born in 1407, in Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, England, her father, Father Matilda de Echingham, was 23 and her mother, Mother Matilda de Echingham, was 21. She married Sir Lawrence Acton in 1426, in Old Felton, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1485, in her hometown, at the age of 78.

fr.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda d’Echingham est née en 1407, à Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Father Matilda d’Echingham, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mother Matilda d’Echingham, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Lawrence Acton en 1426, à Old Felton, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1485, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda de Echingham 1407 in Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Father Matilda de Echingham 23 und ihre Mutter Mother Matilda de Echingham 21. Sie hat 1426 in Old Felton, Northumberland, England Sir Lawrence Acton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1485 im Alter von 78 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei sposato Sir Lawrence Acton nel 1426, nel Old Felton, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1485, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.Old Felton, Northumberland, England: イギリスノースウンバーランドオルド フエルトン
ja.lifeSummary: Matilda de Echinghamが1407年にイギリスノースウンバーランドアクトン アンド オルド フエルトンで生まれた時，父Father Matilda de Echinghamは23歳，母Mother Matilda de Echinghamは21歳であった。1426年にイギリスノースウンバーランドオルド フエルトンでSir Lawrence Actonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1485年に故郷で78歳で死去した。

ko.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: 영국 노르스벌랜드 악턴 앤드 드 프턴
ko.lifeSummary: Matilda de Echingham(이)가 1407년 영국 노르스벌랜드 악턴 앤드 드 프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Father Matilda de Echingham(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mother Matilda de Echingham(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1426년 영국 노르스벌랜드 드 프턴에서 Sir Lawrence Acton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1485년 그녀의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda de Echingham nasceu em 1407, em Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Father Matilda de Echingham, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Mother Matilda de Echingham, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Lawrence Acton em 1426, em Old Felton, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1485, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos.

ru.Acton and Old Felton, Northumberland, En: актон анд олд фелтон, нортумбирланд, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda de Echingham родилась в 1407 г. в местности актон анд олд фелтон, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Father Matilda de Echingham было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mother Matilda de Echingham, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Lawrence Acton в 1426 г. в местности олд фелтон, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1485 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 78 лет.
